refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-functions clarifies how energy efficiency can be achieved through measurement, control, and optimization.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by measuring energy_per_ton over the evaluation period and confirming it meets ≤ E_target; validate monitoring data accuracy, control actions, and optimization effectiveness.
sub_frs: FR1: Measure energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to improve energy efficiency.

candidate_dps: DP1: Integrate energy and load sensors with data acquisition system.
DP2: Implement vehicle control algorithms for energy-efficient operation.
DP3: Develop adaptive optimization algorithms using telemetry data.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Integrate energy and load sensors with data acquisition system.

potential_sources: Data dependency between measurement and control modules
Telemetry data shared across optimization and control
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically precedes DP2 and DP3; coupling is manageable with clear data interfaces.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate sensor data is available and reliable.
Risk of sensor failure impacting energy measurement accuracy.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor data acquisition separately to isolate sensor risks.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components including sensors and control systems onboard the vehicle.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Send energy consumption and load data to NGHE Solution for monitoring and optimization.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive operational commands from Teleoperation or NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of sensors and control logic; low diffusion as data is centralized onboard.
Receives telemetry data but does not contain physical sensors.
Primarily remote control; minimal containment of energy measurement.
No direct containment of energy measurement or control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Energy measurement and control DP is best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize interface complexity and ensure real-time data acquisition.
containment_risks: Potential difficulty in updating sensor hardware once deployed.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate modular sensor packages to ease maintenance and upgrades.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (sensor integration) directly satisfies the refined FR1 (measure energy consumption and tonnage).

diffusion_risks: Telemetry data diffusion to NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules requires robust interface management.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment of DP; interfaces are well-defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing sensor data accuracy and telemetry transmission from Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of measurement DP to Vehicle IM; interfaces to other modules are explicit.

recommended_revisions: Refine sensor maintenance and upgrade strategy within Vehicle module.

decision.justification: The current decomposition and assignments are sound for the measurement sub-FR, but further decomposition is needed for control and optimization sub-FRs to complete the full energy efficiency requirement.
next_level_sub_frs: FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to improve energy efficiency.

revise.why: To decompose remaining sub-functions for control and optimization to enable complete DP and IM assignments.

assumptions: Sensor data is reliable and timely.
Vehicle module can host required sensors and control logic.
open_risks: Sensor failure impact on KPI measurement.
evidence_needed: Sensor accuracy and reliability test results.
